'''zojayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubilatory|jubilatory]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubilatory|jubilatory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zojayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojayithi|zojayithi]] || [[word:zojayiji|zojayiji]] || [[word:zojayishi|zojayishi]] || [[word:zojayiki|zojayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojayuthuthu|zojayuthuthu]] || [[word:zojayujuju|zojayujuju]] || [[word:zojayushushu|zojayushushu]] || [[word:zojayukuku|zojayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojayuthu|zojayuthu]] || [[word:zojayuju|zojayuju]] || [[word:zojayushu|zojayushu]] || [[word:zojayuku|zojayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojayufthuf|zojayufthuf]] || [[word:zojayufjuf|zojayufjuf]] || [[word:zojayufshuf|zojayufshuf]] || [[word:zojayufkuf|zojayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojayethe|zojayethe]] || [[word:zojayeje|zojayeje]] || [[word:zojayeshe|zojayeshe]] || [[word:zojayeke|zojayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojayothotho|zojayothotho]] || [[word:zojayojojo|zojayojojo]] || [[word:zojayoshosho|zojayoshosho]] || [[word:zojayokoko|zojayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojayotho|zojayotho]] || [[word:zojayojo|zojayojo]] || [[word:zojayosho|zojayosho]] || [[word:zojayoko|zojayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojayofthof|zojayofthof]] || [[word:zojayofjof|zojayofjof]] || [[word:zojayofshof|zojayofshof]] || [[word:zojayofkof|zojayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfthÃŸf|zojayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfjÃŸf|zojayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfshÃŸf|zojayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfkÃŸf|zojayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zojayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zojayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zojayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zojayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfthÃŸf|zojayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfjÃŸf|zojayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfshÃŸf|zojayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfkÃŸf|zojayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfthÃŸf|zojayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfjÃŸf|zojayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfshÃŸf|zojayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zojayÃŸfkÃŸf|zojayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zojayÃḊthÃḊ|zojayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zojayÃḊjÃḊ|zojayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zojayÃḊshÃḊ|zojayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zojayÃḊkÃḊ|zojayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zojayathatha|zojayathatha]] || [[word:zojayajaja|zojayajaja]] || [[word:zojayashasha|zojayashasha]] || [[word:zojayakaka|zojayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zojayatha|zojayatha]] || [[word:zojayaja|zojayaja]] || [[word:zojayasha|zojayasha]] || [[word:zojayaka|zojayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zojayafthaf|zojayafthaf]] || [[word:zojayafjaf|zojayafjaf]] || [[word:zojayafshaf|zojayafshaf]] || [[word:zojayafkaf|zojayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zojayasha|zojayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojayshÃḋsha|zojayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojayrosha|zojayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojaymusha|zojaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojayasha|zojayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojaynkshÃḋsha|gozojaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojaynkrosha|gozojaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojaynkmusha|gozojaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojaynkyasha|gozojaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zojajayasha|zojajayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojajayshÃḋsha|zojajayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojajayrosha|zojajayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojajaymusha|zojajaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojajayasha|zojajayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojajaynkshÃḋsha|gozojajaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojajaynkrosha|gozojajaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojajaynkmusha|gozojajaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojajaynkyasha|gozojajaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zejÃḊyasha|zejÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zejÃḊyshÃḋsha|zejÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zejÃḊyrosha|zejÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zejÃḊymusha|zejÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zejÃḊyasha|zejÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozejÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gozejÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozejÃḊynkrosha|gozejÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozejÃḊynkmusha|gozejÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozejÃḊynkyasha|gozejÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zojfayasha|zojfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zojfayshÃḋsha|zojfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zojfayrosha|zojfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zojfaymusha|zojfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zojfayasha|zojfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozojfaynkshÃḋsha|gozojfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozojfaynkrosha|gozojfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozojfaynkmusha|gozojfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozojfaynkyasha|gozojfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
